attributes.name: action
attributes.description: Renders the button as a compact icon-only action button with Tabler action styling. This is visual only and does not define click behavior.

attributes.name: color
attributes.description: Palette color token from the badge color set, such as blue, azure, indigo, purple, pink, red, orange, yellow, lime, green, teal, cyan, or semantic aliases.

elements.name: tblr-file-preview
elements.description: Tabler File Preview custom element for image, PDF, video, and audio files
